chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1986 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection For Katcha Peshi. 23.12.2016. Mr. Mansoor Ali Jatoi, Advocate for petitioner alongwith petitioner. Mr. Ashfaque Nabi Kazi, Assistant A.G alongwith SIP Manzoor Ali on bhelaf of SSP Hyderabad, SIP Noor Muhammad on behalf of DIG Hyderabad and SIP Nisar Ahmed P.S Tando Yousuf. -.-.-. Mr. Agha Waqar Ahmed, Advocate, files vakalatnama on behalf of respondents No.6 and 7, which is taken on record. Today, parawise comments have been filed by police officials, wherein it has been mentioned that an FIR has also been lodged in the matter and primarily the actual controversy between petitioner and private respondents is with regard to a property on which both parties have their respective claims. On the face of it, it is a matter of civil jurisdiction. However, this petition is disposed of with the directions that the aggrieved party will approached the appropriate forum for redressal of his/her grievances and respondents are restrained from causing any harassment to the petitioner. However, it is clarified that this order will not come in the way of private respondents in seeking a remedy through due process of law. JUDGE Ali Haider
